name: Tyrospamites
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the directions on the box for preparing the pastry, including defrosting, handling, baking time, and temperature.
2. Cut the slab of Spam in half.
3. Cut those pieces diagonally to create a triangular cross-section, then slice the Spam into 1/4 inch thick triangles.
4. In a small bowl, crumble the Feta cheese, add the minced garlic and snipped dill, and mix well.
5. Cut the dough into 3 to 4 inch wide strips.
6. Follow the directions on the box for handling the dough; it can be tricky to work with. Use two strips for each pastry.
7. Spray (or brush) the butter-flavored cooking spray between each layer of dough.
8. Place a triangle of Spam at the end of the doubled, sprayed strip and top with about 1 teaspoon of the cheese mixture.
9. Fold the filling into the dough side to side, folding it in as you would fold an American flag (like in Scouts), until you have a triangular pastry with several layers enclosing the Spam filling.
10. Spray (or brush) the remaining pastry with butter-flavored cooking spray.
11. Bake according to package directions until golden brown. These can be frozen before baking and cooked without defrosting a few at a time as needed.
